subgraphs.name: Text to Image (Qwen-Image 2512)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 低分辨率，低画质，肢体畸形，手指畸形，画面过饱和，蜡像感，人脸无细节，过度光滑，画面具有AI感。构图混乱。文字模糊，扭曲

subgraphs.category: Image generation and editing/Text to image
subgraphs.description: Generates images from text prompts using Qwen-Image-2512, with enhanced human realism and finer natural detail over the base version.
